description_full:
📍 US - Remote | 🕐 Posted 2 hours ago - May 16, 2026 | 💰 $250K USD plus tokens | 💼 Permanent | 🧑‍💻 AI | DeFi | Institutional Finance

The company is seeking an exceptional Head of Product to drive product strategy and execution for AXIOM, a leading player in AI, DeFi, and Institutional Finance. This is one of the most exciting Head of Product opportunities in Web3.

📋 Responsibilities include:
- Defining and owning the product vision, strategy, and roadmap
- Leading cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality products
- Collaborating closely with engineering, design, and business stakeholders
- Conducting market research and user analysis to inform decisions
- Prioritizing features and managing the full product lifecycle

🔑 Requirements:
- Proven experience as Head of Product or similar senior product role
- Strong background in Web3, blockchain, DeFi or crypto products
- Excellent leadership and communication skills
- Data-driven mindset with passion for user experience
- Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment

💡 Perks & Benefits:
- Competitive compensation of $250K USD plus tokens
- US Remote setup
- Opportunity to shape groundbreaking products in AI, DeFi and Institutional Finance
- Professional growth in a dynamic team

📩 To apply: Email lumi@axiomrecruit.com or visit www.axiomrecruit.com. Applications without proper subject or details may not be reviewed.

🔗 Original post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/lumi-axiom-recruit_this-is-the-most-exciting-head-of-product-share-7460993896286871552-Z8js
